items.name_en: M14680 Monogram White Color. Nicolas Ghesquière presents the Rivage BB handbag for 2025 Spring/Summer, reinterpreting the Noctambule bag launched in 1999, cut from Monogram canvas in a bucket silhouette. Hard case style handle, engraved lock, and leather luggage tag highlight classic elements; wear the strap for convenient crossbody carrying. Dimensions: 18*7*12cm.
